---
title: '`syncweaver deps`'
---

Analyze source-repository dependencies and surface information needed when
integrating source changes into a host repository.

| Subcommand | Description |
|---|---|
| [`analyze`](analyze.qmd) | Analyze source usage and optional release impact |
| [`select-update-paths`](select-update-paths.qmd) | Filter candidate source paths and emit selection metadata |

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver deps --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```
